reachability_artifacts: nightly or workflow_dispatch live workflow URL and run identifier
endpoint-conformance-matrix-v1 artifact with mandatory Ollama Cloud and OpenAI RUN rows
local Ollama RUN observation or an explicit local Ollama SKIP row
mandatory-SKIP mutation failure followed by restored RUN success
dialect equality success or drift failure with raw and candidate artifacts and an unchanged worktree

effort_complexity.rationale: See spec.json; implementer must re-assess against live workflow mechanics and configured provider availability before design review.

release_benefit: A SwornAgent operator can run the full accountable implement-verify loop on Ollama Cloud or a chosen local OpenAI-compatible server, while maintainers add endpoints as data and detect provider wire drift before it reaches production.

positive_scenarios: Every declared endpoint produces a visible RUN, FAIL, or reasoned SKIP row.
Ollama Cloud and OpenAI execute nightly and successful observations reproduce the checked-in dialect table.
A configured local Ollama service produces a real conformance observation on demand.
negative_scenarios: A mandatory row cannot skip or disappear while the workflow remains green.
Dialect drift fails without editing or publishing repository content.
Credentials and model payload content never enter logs or artifacts.
validation.benefit_hypothesis: An explicit fail-closed live matrix catches endpoint drift and missing coverage before operators discover incompatibility during a real accountable loop.

design_decisions.choice: Declare every endpoint as a machine-counted RUN, FAIL, or reasoned SKIP row, with Ollama Cloud and OpenAI mandatory nightly.
options: declared matrix with mandatory canaries and explicit skips
require every endpoint nightly on a self-hosted runner
test only Ollama Cloud and local Ollama
design_decisions.human_decision: Option A selected by repository owner on 2026-07-14.
design_decisions.rationale: Coverage omissions stay visible and machine-countable without claiming GitHub-hosted runners can provide every local service.

design_decisions.choice: Require explicit runner/base/model configuration for local services and never infer that workflow localhost reaches an operator machine.
design_decisions.human_decision: Ratified as part of the declared live matrix decision on 2026-07-14.
design_decisions.rationale: A real row must describe the environment that actually ran it; absence is explicit rather than misleading or invisible.

design_decisions.choice: Fail and upload review artifacts on dialect drift without editing, committing, pushing, or opening a pull request.
design_decisions.human_decision: Option B selected by repository owner on 2026-07-14.
design_decisions.rationale: Observed drift becomes actionable while deterministic runtime changes remain subject to human review.

design_decisions.choice: Keep the live matrix schedule/workflow_dispatch only and outside the pull-request gate.
options: block pull requests on live providers
design_decisions.human_decision: Ratified from the commissioned brief on 2026-07-14.
design_decisions.rationale: Paid non-deterministic provider calls remain visible without making unrelated merges depend on external uptime.
